text: We decided to use Postgres over MongoDB for the Atlas project. ACID compliance is non-negotiable for the transaction ledger.
Setting up Docker and Kubernetes for the Phoenix deployment. Alice approved the architecture yesterday.
Switching the Atlas dashboard from JavaScript to TypeScript. Dave and I reviewed the React components — big improvement.
We chose Redis for session caching in the Atlas API. Bob benchmarked it against Memcached and Redis won on throughput.
Grace here — I will own the Orion project going forward. We are standardising on Python and FastAPI across all backend services.
